description: Transfers, refunds, reversals, cash withdrawals, or split purchases could be modeled as ordinary spend and distort category totals.
mitigation: Require explicit attributable active/retired transfer and refund relationships; only active transactions/links affect totals; void/supersession atomically retires links; revocation/replacement is reasoned and atomic; preserve all source facts; never infer exclusion from description alone; example-map each special-transaction policy in the PRD.
